questions.q: On April 24, 2026, NATO clarified that the US cannot suspend which country from the alliance, following a reported Pentagon email?
On April 24, 2026, a 75-year-old millionaire US big game hunter was reported to have been trampled to death in Central Africa by what animal?
Which British territory's sovereignty was affirmed by No 10 on April 24, 2026, following reports of a US 'review'?
On April 24, 2026, Polish PM Donald Tusk stated that an informal EU summit in Cyprus was the 'first with no Russians in the room', an apparent jab at which absent leader?
In April 2026, Donald Trump claimed he speaks for the UK more than which member of the British royal family?
